metadata.title: Templio - Custom websites, built with care
metadata.description: Custom websites for people who still care how the web feels. Pitch an idea. If it's interesting, we build it together.

hero.sub: Pitch a portfolio, fan site, studio page, or strange little corner of the internet. If it has a pulse, we can build around it.

manifesto.heading: Most websites are the same template in a different color.
manifesto.body1: Templio is for the people still excited about the web. The ones who notice a good hover state, a weird font choice, a layout that isn't trying to be Linear.
manifesto.body2: Pitch me an idea. If it's interesting, we build it - for free, together, at whatever pace works. No invoices, no sales calls, no templates.
manifesto.finePrint: I take on a few of these at a time, so it might take a minute to hear back. I read every pitch.

showcase.heading: Every one started as a pitch.
showcase.subheading: Full descriptions, categories, and live links to the sites currently up.
showcase.note: More in progress. Yours could be here.

ayush.name: Ayush Rameja
ayush.description: A personal site with crisp writing, focused motion, and a sharp product-builder identity.

bikram.name: Bikramdeep Singh
bikram.description: A data-focused portfolio with editorial typography, layered atmospherics, and a polished contact surface.

arnold.name: Arnold Kevin Desouza
arnold.description: A bold single-page profile with strong identity, sharp type choices, and a stripped-back hero-led experience.

lowhp.name: Low HP Studio
lowhp.description: A studio landing page tuned for product storytelling, calm pacing, and crisp product positioning.

lunaticladz.name: LunaticLadz
lunaticladz.description: A community-driven site built around streams, updates, and social hooks with a louder visual personality.

pitchSection.heading: Send the idea. I'll read it properly.
pitchSection.bodyBeforeLink: Tell me what you want to build, then leave an email. For a direct intro, reach the founder through

form.ideaPlaceholder: What do you want to build?
form.successMessage: Got it. I'll read it properly and reach out. Thank you.
form.alreadyExistsMessage: You've already pitched - I haven't forgotten. Promise.
form.invalidEmailToast: Please enter a valid email address.
form.errorToast: Failed to send your pitch. Please try again.

contact.title: Contact Templio
contact.subtitle: Questions about a pitch, a site that's live, or just want to say hi? Drop a note.
contact.footerNote: Prefer a direct intro? Reach the founder via
contact.successToast: Message sent successfully. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorToast: Failed to send message. Please try again.
